# Release Notes

## April 7, 2026

- **[Feature] Screen Recording Capture Mode** — RadKit now supports screen recording as WebM video with configurable frame rate, audio capture (microphone, system audio or both), resolution settings and an optional webcam overlay. Recordings open in a preview tab where you can play back, save or discard them. A recordings management page lets you browse, download and delete past recordings from local storage. (#37)

- **[Feature] Capture History for Screenshots and Recordings** — All screenshots and recordings are now automatically saved to local extension storage. You can browse, download and delete past captures from new management pages accessible via the Capture and Record tabs. (#37)

- **[Improvement] Tabbed Popup Interface** — The RadKit popup is now organized into two tabs: Capture for screenshots and Record for screen recording, keeping the interface clean as new features are added. (#37)
